name: signalk-virtual-weather-sensors
description: SignalK plugin that provides comprehensive weather data from AccuWeather API with calculated wind values and NMEA2000-compatible environmental measurements
author: SignalK Community

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:types && npm run build:bundle && npm run package:dist
scripts.package:dist: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const deployDir='dist/signalk-virtual-weather-sensors'; const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); delete pkg.type; delete pkg.devDependencies; delete pkg.scripts; pkg.files=['*.js','*.js.map','*.d.ts','*.d.ts.map','calculators/','constants/','mappers/','services/','types/','utils/','README.md','LICENSE','CHANGELOG.md','DEVELOPMENT.md','TODO.md']; fs.writeFileSync(path.join(deployDir,'package.json'), JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2)); const otherFiles=['README.md','CHANGELOG.md','LICENSE','DEVELOPMENT.md','TODO.md']; otherFiles.forEach(file => { if(fs.existsSync(file)) { fs.copyFileSync(file, path.join(deployDir,file)); console.log('Copied:', file); } }); console.log('Package prepared in:', deployDir);"
scripts.validate: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test:run
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test:run
